name: World Neglected Tropical Diseases Day
description: Raises awareness of neglected tropical diseases and mobilizes action to prevent, treat, and eliminate them, especially in underserved communities. Theme (2026): Unite. Act. Eliminate.

name: World Cancer Day
description: Promotes prevention, early detection, treatment access, and people-centred cancer care. Theme (2026): United by Unique.

name: World Hearing Day
description: Promotes prevention, early detection, and treatment of ear and hearing problems to reduce disability and improve quality of life. Theme (2026): From communities to classrooms: hearing care for all children.

name: World Oral Health Day
description: Highlights oral health as part of overall health and encourages lifelong oral hygiene and preventive care. Theme (2026): A Happy Mouth Is... A Happy Life.

name: World Water Day
description: Focuses on safe freshwater access, water security, sanitation, and action toward SDG 6. Theme (2026): Water and Gender.

name: World Tuberculosis Day
description: Raises awareness that tuberculosis is preventable and curable and calls for better diagnosis, treatment, and equity in care. Theme (2026): Yes! We can end TB! Led by countries. Powered by people.

name: World Health Day
description: Marks the anniversary of WHO and draws global attention to priority public health issues. Theme (2026): Together for science.

name: Earth Day
description: Encourages environmental protection and climate action to safeguard ecosystems and human health. Theme (2026): Our Power, Our Planet.

name: World Immunization Week
description: Promotes vaccination across all ages to prevent disease, disability, and deaths. Theme (2026): For every generation, vaccines work.

name: World Malaria Day
description: Highlights prevention, diagnosis, and treatment to reduce malaria illness and deaths, especially in endemic regions. Theme (2026): Not announced yet (as of March 2026).

name: World Hand Hygiene Day
description: Promotes proper hand hygiene in health care to prevent healthcare-associated infections and antimicrobial resistance. Theme (2026): Action saves lives.

name: World No Tobacco Day
description: Raises awareness of harms from tobacco and nicotine products and supports evidence-based tobacco control and cessation. Theme (2026): Unmasking the appeal - countering nicotine and tobacco addiction.

name: World Blood Donor Day
description: Thanks voluntary unpaid blood donors and raises awareness of the need for safe blood and blood products. Theme (2026): Not announced yet (as of March 2026).

name: International Day of Yoga
description: Promotes yoga for physical and mental well-being and healthier lifestyles. Theme (2026): Not announced yet (as of March 2026).

name: Doctors' Day
description: In India, observed on 1 July to honor doctors' service to patients and society and commemorate Dr. Bidhan Chandra Roy. Theme (2026): Not announced yet (as of March 2026).

name: World Hepatitis Day
description: Raises awareness of viral hepatitis prevention, testing, and treatment to reduce cirrhosis and liver cancer. Theme (2026): Not announced yet (as of March 2026).

name: World Breastfeeding Week
description: Promotes breastfeeding as a cornerstone of infant and maternal health and advocates stronger support systems for mothers. Theme (2026): Breastfeeding for a Sustainable Start in Life: Strengthen What Works.

name: World Patient Safety Day
description: Calls for reducing preventable harm in health care and strengthening safe systems and practices. Theme (2026): Not announced yet (as of March 2026).

name: World Mental Health Day
description: Raises awareness of mental health conditions and supports access to rights-based mental health care. Theme (2026): Not announced yet (as of March 2026).

name: Global Handwashing Day
description: Advocates handwashing with soap at critical times to prevent infections and improve health outcomes. Theme (current multi-year): Be a Handwashing Hero.

name: World Prematurity Day
description: Raises awareness of preterm birth and the need for quality care and family support for babies born too soon. Theme (2026): Not announced yet (as of March 2026).

name: World AMR Awareness Week
description: Promotes action against antimicrobial resistance across human, animal, and environmental health (One Health). Theme (2026): Not announced yet (as of March 2026).

name: World COPD Day
description: Raises awareness of chronic obstructive pulmonary disease and the importance of early diagnosis, prevention, and treatment. Theme (2026): Not announced yet (as of March 2026).

name: World AIDS Day
description: Unites people worldwide to support those living with HIV, remember those lost, and accelerate progress toward ending AIDS. Theme (2026): Not announced yet (as of March 2026).
